sync.conflict: Another sync is running in the background. Try again in a moment.

pat.label: Token de acceso personal de GitHub
pat.help: Necesita public_repo (o repo para privados). Almacenado localmente, solo enviado a api.github.com.
pat.promptSubtitle: Pega un PAT de GitHub para empezar

ai.storedLocallyPrefix: Guardado localmente en esta extensión. Solo enviado a

search.buildFirst: Primero construye el índice de búsqueda.

index.partialFailure: Index built with {failed} failed batches ({embedded} embedded, {skipped} skipped){reason}. Click again to retry — already-embedded rows skip via contentHash.

tag.partialFailure: Auto-tag finished with {failed} failed ({tagged} tagged){reason}. Click again to retry only the untagged.

translate.title: Traduce {n} descripciones de repo al idioma de UI actual ({locale}). Usa tu clave del proveedor de AI — ~¥0.30 para 1000 repos.
translate.englishGuard: Switch UI language first (English originals need no translation).
translate.partialFailure: {failed} repos couldn't be translated ({names}{more}){reason}. Click Translate again to retry just those — already-done ones will skip.

digest.headerSummary: Resumen semanal — top {shown} de {total} esta semana
digest.noActivityHelp: Ningún repo marcado se ha actualizado en los últimos 7 días.

deepIndex.rowTitleEnabled: Obtiene el código fuente + incrusta fragmentos de código para que este repo aparezca en la búsqueda de código
deepIndex.rowTitleDisabled: Configura PAT + clave AI en el popup primero.
deepIndex.zeroChunks: Deep-index produced 0 chunks for {fullName} ({failed}/{chunks} failed){reason}. Repo not marked complete — click Deep-index again to retry.
deepIndex.buttonTooltip: Fetch source from top-{n} unindexed starred repos and embed their code so it shows up in semantic search.

stars.syncPrompt: Pulsa Sync para traer tus stars de GitHub.

manage.title: 🌟 GitHub Star Kit · Gestión
manage.noStarsSubtitle: Sin caché — abre el popup y pulsa Sync.
manage.noMatchHelp: Limpia la búsqueda, cambia lenguaje a "Todos", o desactiva "Ocultar archivados/forks".
manage.needsKeys: Configure GitHub PAT and AI Provider key in the popup before deep-indexing.
manage.deepIndexHint: 💡 Deep-index pulls the repo's source code, splits it into snippets, and embeds them so you can search code content (functions / variables / comments) from the popup search bar. Try queries like "debounce function" or "prepare SQL" after indexing — code snippets show up alongside repo matches.
manage.deepIndexDoneToast: ✓ Deep-indexed {repo} — try searching code (e.g. function names) in the popup.
manage.needsKeysHint: 💡 To enable per-row Deep-index, open the extension popup and configure your GitHub PAT + AI Provider key. The page will refresh those buttons automatically once both are saved.

github.auth: GitHub rejected the token — check the PAT and its scope.
github.rate_limit: GitHub rate limit hit. Try again later.
github.rate_limit_with_reset: GitHub rate limit hit. Try again in ~{mins} min.
github.not_found: Endpoint not found (GitHub may have changed).
github.server: GitHub returned a server error. Try again in a moment.
github.parse: Could not parse the GitHub response.

ai.auth: AI provider rejected the API key — check the key and provider settings.
ai.rate_limit: AI provider rate limit hit. Try again in a moment.
ai.timeout: AI request timed out. Try again or check your connection.
ai.network: Network failure reaching the AI provider — check your connection.
ai.server: AI provider returned a server error. Try again in a moment.
ai.parse: AI provider returned an unexpected response shape.
